TestCase z5Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: set first element to 0.0 if it is greater than 0.0
    if (follow_case.v[0] > 0.0) {
        follow_case.v[0] = 0.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
